title: Chilli Sauce
excerpt: Ingredients 300 ml oil 1 kg red chillies, finely chopped 250 g garlic, finely chopped 750 ml vinegar 1 x 80 g box steak & chop seasoning 3 x 420 g tins tomato puree 2 x 70 g tubs tomato paste Method Pour a little oil into a large pot and fry the chillies and …
html:
Ingredients

  • 300 ml oil
  • 1 kg red chillies, finely chopped
  • 250 g garlic, finely chopped
  • 750 ml vinegar
  • 1 x 80 g box steak & chop seasoning
  • 3 x 420 g tins tomato puree
  • 2 x 70 g tubs tomato paste

Method

Pour a little oil into a large pot and fry the chillies and garlic together. Now add the vinegar, the rest of the oil and the steak & chop seasoning and cook for another 5 minutes. Then add the tomato puree and tomato paste and cook for 20 minutes until it turns a deep dark red colour.

Remove from the heat, and once it has cooled, put the sauce into bottles in your fridge. The sauce can keep for up to 3 months.

PS. Salt isn't needed, as the steak and chops seasoning is already salty.

Easy!
